title: FuelCell Energy Inc (FCEL) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: FuelCell Energy Q1 2023 earnings conference call held March 9, 2023. Q1 2023 results: revenues of $37.07 million surpassed Zacks Consensus Estimate by 34.48%. Product revenues $9.1 million compared to $18 million in Q1 2022. Service agreements revenues increased to $13.9 million from $2.2 million in Q1 2022. Gross profit totaled $5.2 million, compared to gross loss of $2.9 million in prior year quarter. Operating expenses decreased to $27.7 million from $41.9 million YoY. The company finished quarter with backlog of approximately $1.1 billion. Generation revenues contributed significantly to results, reflecting strong performance from operational fuel cell projects. Management discussed strategic focus on building backlog of larger utility-scale projects while managing costs. Company emphasized portfolio diversification between product sales, service agreements, generation revenues, and advanced technology development. Investment in solid oxide technology program highlighted as key long-term growth driver. Management confidence in backlog conversion and ability to achieve positive gross margins in coming periods.
